description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton with a predominantly white exterior and a yellow top. The front features the brand name 'FARAGELLO GOLD' in gold letters, along with an image of a red apple and a green leaf, indicating apple juice. The sides of the carton display the brand name vertically and additional product information, including a list of ingredients and nutritional facts. The top of the carton is fitted with a white screw cap for pouring, set into a yellow panel. The back of the carton contains detailed nutritional information and multilingual text. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed for easy handling and pouring.
description: A white and yellow rectangular juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' with a red apple image and a white screw cap on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' label, a large red apple illustration, and the white screw cap on top.
description_view_1: Side view with the brand name 'FARAGELLO' displayed vertically and part of the cap visible.
description_view_2: Back view featuring detailed nutritional information, multilingual text, and the yellow top with the cap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the vertical 'FARAGELLO' label and partial view of the nutritional panel.
